privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to model a 3D stepped shaft from scratch (synthetic data) using a 2D profile. The mathematical calculations confirm that the true volume of the target solid is exactly 7555.53 mm3, correctly matching the 'expected_volume_mm3' metadata claim of 7555. Additionally, revolution of this shape around the Y-axis creates a bounding box of 30.0mm in X, 25.0mm in Y, and 30.0mm in Z, successfully verifying the 'expected_bounds' metadata values. Output paths '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/stepped_shaft.slvs' and '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/stepped_shaft.stl' exactly match the task requirements and export logic.
